headline: Walmart Bets On BTS ARIH Brand To Refresh Omni Channel Growth
summary: Walmart (NasdaqGS:WMT) is rolling out ARIH, a new Western Korean food and beverage brand created with BTS, across its U.S. stores and online platform. The launch is exclusive to Walmart in the U.S., covering both physical locations and its e-commerce channel. ARIH targets younger and more diverse shoppers by blending Korean flavors with Western formats in a mass market offering. For Walmart, a retailer built on scale in grocery and general merchandise, ARIH adds a culturally driven brand...
